assignment:
## Purpose
The lab notebook is the running record of your work throughout the course. It should capture observations, concept sketches, short analyses, and reflections from each instructional day.
## Include the Following
- Daily dated entries - Notes from lectures and demonstrations - Diagrams, tables, or quick data summaries when appropriate - Responses to activity prompts from the lesson pages - Brief reflections that connect one day’s topic to another
## Submission Guidance
Submit either:
- a single scanned or compiled PDF, or - a typed document with clearly labeled daily sections
## Evaluation Criteria
- Completeness across all 10 days - Accuracy of scientific ideas - Quality of observations and explanations - Clear organization - Evidence of synthesis across units
